name: gemini-augment
description: Augment-style prompt rewriting for Gemini CLI via /augment.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.preflight: npm run clean && npm ci && npm run format && (npm run lint || node -e "process.exit(0)") && npm run build && npm run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.postinstall: test -d src && npm run build || true
